traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a dragon type. Your choice determines the damage type for your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance traits.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with a 15-foot Cone or 30-foot Line (5 ft wide) exhalation. Each creature in the area makes a DEX save (DC 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency Bonus). On a fail, the creature takes damage of your ancestral type; on a success, half damage. Damage: 1d10 at level 1, 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 11, 4d10 at level 17. Uses equal to Proficiency Bonus; all regained on Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to the damage type determined by your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.description: Starting at level 5, you can sprout spectral wings as a Bonus Action, granting a Fly Speed equal to your Speed for 10 minutes or until you retract them or gain the Incapacitated condition. Once used, not again until Long Rest.
